subject: A group of armored defenders on top of a ruined stone wall, holding off an aerial assault of winged creatures
description: Three armored humanoid figures stand atop a crumbling stone parapet, weapons raised against a sky full of large winged creatures swooping in from multiple angles. The leftmost figure thrusts a spear upward; a central figure in plumed helmet braces; a third figure draws a ranged weapon. In the right foreground, a massive dark-feathered bird or griffin is seen from behind, suggesting the viewer's vantage is also airborne. The sky is hazy orange-gold with the chaotic press of diving creatures. The stonework below shows arched ruins overgrown with sparse vegetation.
foreground: three armored figures on a stone parapet, weapons raised
background: hazy orange-gold sky filled with swooping winged creatures
